directory_roles.build/: Generated output only - do not edit

build_pipeline.single_site_build_command: cd /home/chubert/omni-builder && python3 -c "from engine.build_sites import build_single_site; build_single_site('sites/site_alma')"
build_pipeline.notes: Engine does plain string replace only. base.html must use {{ content }} exclusively. All includes must be inlined into base.html. Never append serve command to build command.
build_pipeline.full_deploy_command: cd /home/chubert/omni-builder && python3 -c "from engine.build_sites import build_single_site; build_single_site('sites/site_alma')" && cp -r sites/site_alma/assets/ sites/site_alma/build/assets/ && cp sites/site_alma/build/index/index.html sites/site_alma/build/index.html && rsync -avz -e "ssh -i ~/.ssh/github_actions_alma" sites/site_alma/build/ root@217.154.45.205:/var/www/vhosts/alma-enterprises.co.uk/httpdocs/

rules: Master Report must be appended only - never delete fields
Single site build command for development, all sites for production only

changelog.change: Master Report auto-generated from real site structure by omni-builder AI assistant.
Engine fix: if __name__ == __main__ guard added to build_sites.py — import no longer triggers full loop across all sites.
base.html must use {{ content }} only — engine does plain string replace, no Jinja2, no {% %} tags supported.
Global components (header, cookie banner) must be inlined directly into theme/base.html — engine has no include system.
assets/ directory must be copied into build/ or served from project root — build/ directory only contains generated HTML.
Never append serve command to build command — if server already running on port 8000 it will throw OSError. Build only, then refresh browser.
Images migrated from Jekyll project to assets/images (19 files).
Migration confirmed complete. Jekyll _data files not required — all content rendered into pages.json. Images migrated.
Cookie banner inlined into base.html for all sites. Jekyll {% include %} tags removed and replaced with working inlined HTML.
CSS files migrated from Jekyll _site compiled output into assets/css/. Assets copied into build/. assets/ must be re-copied into build/ after every build.
Added known_issue: body_content must never contain full standalone HTML — double header/footer risk on all sites migrated from Jekyll.
Added known_issue: use Jekyll _site compiled output as body_content source of truth where available. Extract <main> only.

GitHub Actions deployment confirmed working for site_HCR. SSH key stored as SSH_PRIVATE_KEY secret. LFS enabled for pages.json. build.py in repo root. Workflow at .github/workflows/deploy.yml. Push to main triggers full build and rsync deploy to Plesk.
Deployment server and domain recorded: 217.154.45.205 / alma-enterprises.co.uk
base.html fully fixed: all Jekyll tags removed, {{ content }} token confirmed, navigation and footer inlined, broken JS references removed, CSS paths hardcoded to /assets/css/.
Build confirmed SUCCESS after base.html fix. Assets copied to build/.
Master Report updated: content_status added, assets.css_files recorded, deployment_workflow gap noted (no GitHub Actions configured), known_issues updated.
Homepage added to pages.json (slug: index) — body_content extracted from Jekyll _site/index.html <main> using add_index.py script.
build/index.html created by copying build/index/index.html — homepage confirmed rendering correctly at localhost:8000.
Bulk extracted 898 pages from Jekyll _site into pages.json. 9 skipped (no <main>). Total pages now: 904
Fixed 1 skipped pages (no <main> tag) by extracting <body> minus nav/footer: ['about-us']

Fixed 8 service pages (no html/body tags) by stripping nav/footer from raw content: ['services/end-of-tenancy-clearance', 'services/bereavement-clearance', 'services/commercial-clearance', 'services/house-clearance', 'services/garage-clearance', 'services/loft-clearance', 'services/hoarder-clearance', 'services/probate-clearance']
about-us page re-extracted: <style> block pulled from <head> and prepended to body content. Previous extraction missed styles causing broken hero and trust-banner layout.
Full alma build confirmed: 913 pages in pages.json, all service pages and location pages extracted from Jekyll _site. build/ rebuilt and assets copied.
Live crawl from https://alma-enterprises.co.uk: 0 pages added, 36 updated. Top-level, service hubs, one example per service-location.
Stripped Jekyll tags from theme/base.html (site.baseurl, site.url, include, block, if, for, etc.).
Bulk build: SUCCESS. All 27 sites processed.
Full bulk build of all 27 sites completed successfully. All sites now have a base.html template and build without errors.
Added GitHub Actions build-only workflow (no rsync). Created build.py and .gitattributes.
Initialized git repository locally, added .gitignore, created initial commit.
Pushed to GitHub: remote set to https://github.com/vswebsitedesign-ctrl/site_alma.git. GitHub Actions will now build on push.
Phone number corrected to 07932 521901 in send.php and Master Report. Previous value 07931 476 744 was incorrect.

Full build deployed to live server via rsync. 914 pages including thank-you slug. send.php deployed individually to httpdocs/. Assets copied to build/. Homepage fix applied. Site live at alma-enterprises.co.uk.
send.php email subject fixed: UTF-8 em dash replaced with ASCII hyphen to prevent garbled characters in email subject line. Redeployed individually via rsync.

Full session summary: send.php created and deployed. Fields: name, phone, postcode, service (mandatory), email, message (optional), _honeypot (spam trap). addAddress: info@alma-enterprises.co.uk. Phone: 07932 521901. Redirect: /thank-you/ via window.location.href. thank-you slug added to pages.json (914 total pages). Contact hero fixed: min-height, gradient lightened, text repositioned right to match homepage. JS fetch redirect fixed to window.location.href. Email subject UTF-8 em dash replaced with ASCII hyphen. All changes deployed to alma-enterprises.co.uk via rsync. send.php deployed individually.
robots.txt generated from pages.json and deployed. sitemap.xml already existed on server — regenerated from pages.json and redeployed. Both generated at build time, never static files.
sitemap.xml regenerated: excluded junk template slugs (footer, navigation, cta, location, service-location), fixed homepage URL from /index/ to /, fixed empty slug producing //. Redeployed to server.

GSC audit completed. Key findings: trailing slash duplicates across service-location pages causing split impressions and redirect issues. Out-of-service-area queries identified (Retford, Doncaster, Penzance etc). High-impression zero-click pages identified for CTR improvement. Action plan logged.

GSC audit fixes applied. Fix 1: trailing slashes already handled by Plesk 301 redirect at server level — no code change needed. Fix 2: sitemap confirmed clean — all URLs have trailing slashes. Fix 3: out-of-area queries (retford, doncaster, penzance etc) confirmed not present as pages in pages.json — no action needed. Fix 4: meta description hardcoded in base.html identified as CTR issue — engine updated to support {{ description }} token with fallback to default. base.html meta description to be updated to {{ description }} token. description field to be added to high-impression pages in pages.json.

Per-page meta descriptions implemented. Engine updated with {{ description }} token support and default fallback. base.html updated to use {{ description }} token. 10 high-impression pages given unique descriptions: services/house-clearance/dalton-in-furness, services/commercial-clearance/grange-over-sands, services/commercial-clearance/lancaster, services/house-clearance/haverigg, services/house-clearance/askam-in-furness, services/house-clearance/cumbria, services/commercial-clearance/morecambe, services/house-clearance/kirkby-in-furness, about-us, contact. Full rebuild and rsync deploy completed.

679 service-location pages updated with unique local paragraphs injected from Service Location Paragraphs.txt and new_paragraphs.yml. Paragraphs inserted after hero section using <!-- 2. FAST ANSWERS --> anchor. Covers house, garage, hoarder, commercial, loft, end-of-tenancy, and probate clearance service types. Full rebuild and rsync deploy completed.

Full deploy command recorded in build_pipeline.full_deploy_command. Canonical standard: build → cp assets → cp homepage fix → rsync to server. Must be used every session, never reconstructed from parts.

Canonical tag and OG tags added to base.html using {{ slug }}, {{ title }}, {{ description }} tokens. Duplicate hardcoded canonical removed. {{ slug }} token added to engine. 793 service-location page quote forms fixed to redirect via window.location.href to /thank-you/ instead of showing inline success message. Full rebuild and rsync deploy completed.
Full deploy confirmed live. Canonical tags, OG tags, {{ slug }} token, 793 form JS redirects all live on alma-enterprises.co.uk.

All page uniqueness improvements complete. 776 schema postalCode fields updated, 63 postcode data attributes added from postcodes.json. Alt text confirmed already location-specific. H1 subheadings confirmed unique per service type via YAML data. Internal linking confirmed complete across all 101 hub pages — 4 policy pages correctly excluded. All pending uniqueness items resolved.

Master Report housekeeping: template_token updated to include {{ title }} and {{ slug }}, fields_detected updated to include description, known_issues.template_tags_in_base updated to reflect all four supported tokens.

Unique meta descriptions generated and deployed for 898 pages. Service-location pages include service type, location name and postcode. Hub pages include location and postcode. Service index pages include service type and area. All pages now have unique descriptions — generic fallback no longer needed for any page.
Accessibility fix: title attribute added to all Google Maps iframes on 793 pages. Fixes PageSpeed accessibility audit failure. Target score 100 Accessibility.

GSC actions completed: sitemap resubmitted at https://alma-enterprises.co.uk/sitemap.xml. Key pages submitted for indexing via URL Inspection tool: homepage, contact, about-us, services/house-clearance/dalton-in-furness, services/house-clearance/cumbria. Google recrawl expected within 24-48 hours.

known_issues.template_tags_in_base: FIXED 2026-06-01 — engine supports {{ content }}, {{ title }}, {{ description }}, {{ slug }} tokens. All four active in base.html. No other token types supported — no Jinja2, no {% %} tags.
known_issues.includes_not_rendered: FIXED 2026-05-25 — navigation and footer inlined into base.html. _includes/ directory retained but not used by engine.
known_issues.assets_not_in_build: assets/ directory is not copied to build/ automatically — serve from project root or copy manually
known_issues.port_clash: always check port 8000 is free before serving — build only and refresh if server already running
known_issues.assets_build_sync: assets/ must be re-copied into build/ after every build — cp -r assets/ build/assets/ from each site root
known_issues.body_content_full_html: body_content must never contain full standalone HTML documents (no <!DOCTYPE>, <html>, <head>, <body> tags). Strip to <main> contents only. Full documents cause double header/footer when wrapped by base.html. Fix: re.search(r"<main[^>]*>(.*?)</main>", body, re.DOTALL)
known_issues.jekyll_site_source_of_truth: Where a matching Jekyll source exists at /home/chubert/<PROJECT>/_site/, use compiled _site HTML as body_content source of truth. Extract <main> contents only. Never use AI-rewritten content when compiled source exists.
known_issues.github_secret_name: GitHub secret MUST be named SSH_PRIVATE_KEY — workflow references secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY. Any other name causes Permission denied on rsync.
known_issues.lfs_checkout: pages.json tracked via Git LFS — workflow checkout must include lfs: true or build fails with empty JSON error.
known_issues.build_script: build.py must exist in repo root — GitHub Actions runner calls python3 build.py directly.
known_issues.yaml_multiline: Never embed multiline Python in deploy.yml — always use a separate build.py script to avoid YAML syntax errors.
known_issues.base_html_jekyll_tags: FIXED 2026-05-25 — removed all Jekyll tags from base.html. site.title, site.baseurl, prepend filters, block/endblock all replaced. Navigation and footer inlined directly.
known_issues.missing_js_assets: cookieconsent.umd.js and cookie-init.js referenced in base.html but do not exist in assets/js/ — removed references from base.html on 2026-05-25. CSS only retained.
known_issues.homepage_slug: Engine builds index slug as build/index/index.html — must be manually copied to build/index.html after every build: cp build/index/index.html build/index.html
known_issues.head_styles_in_jekyll: Some Jekyll pages store CSS in <head> <style> blocks rather than inline — extractor must pull <style> block from <head> AND strip nav/footer from body. Affects pages using custom layouts without <main> tags. Fix: extract style block separately and prepend to body content.
known_issues.contact_hero_inline_styles: Contact page hero styles are inline in pages.json body_content — not in main.css. min-height, gradient and text alignment must be edited via pages.json.
known_issues.form_fetch_redirect: Contact form uses JS fetch — PHP header redirect ignored. Redirect must be handled via window.location.href in the fetch .then() block in pages.json body_content.
known_issues.sitemap_exclude_slugs: Sitemap generator must exclude template slugs: footer, navigation, cta, location, service-location and empty slugs. index slug must map to / not /index/.
known_issues.meta_description_hardcoded: FIXED 2026-06-01 — engine now supports {{ description }} token. base.html must use {{ description }} in meta description tag. Pages without description field fall back to default Cumbria/North Lancashire description.
known_issues.iframe_missing_title: FIXED 2026-06-01 — title attribute added to all Google Maps iframes across 793 pages in pages.json. Title: Map showing Alma Enterprises clearance service location.

assets.js_files: none — cookieconsent JS missing, references removed from base.html

migration.reason: All Jekyll _data, _layouts, _includes content already rendered into data/pages.json body_content fields.
